title: holosteum umbellatum subsp. tenerrimum
intro: Holosteum umbellatum subsp. tenerrimum, also known as the delicate coral root, is a subspecies of plant in the family Caryophyllaceae, characterized by its delicate roots and white or pinkish flowers. Traditionally, Holosteum umbellatum subsp. tenerrimum has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including aiding in digestion, reducing fever, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Holosteum umbellatum subsp. tenerrimum can be used as a tea, tincture, or infusion, often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
